Home.heroTitle: Master the Art of Strategic Resilience
Home.heroCopy: The world's most sophisticated repository of business and product failures. Decode the past to engineer a bulletproof future with proprietary AI insights.
Home.featuresCopy: Our platform provides the analytical depth required to navigate the complexities of modern entrepreneurship.

repository.title: Deep Repository
repository.desc: Every failure documented with forensic precision, covering finances, team dynamics, and market conditions.

analysis.title: Neural Analysis
analysis.desc: Our proprietary AI models extract non-obvious patterns from failure stories to provide predictive guidance.

mitigation.title: Risk Mitigation
mitigation.desc: Turn your current strategy into a stress-tested model using data from failures in your specific vertical.

Home.vision: The only real mistake is the one from which we learn nothing.
